title: sideritis boissieri
intro: Sideritis boissieri is a species of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis, commonly known as Ironwort or Boissier's Sideritis, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis boissieri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Sideritis boissieri often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
